contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: capoeira video embed fix + Ginga warm-up + move coverage tracking
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/20
  
  Details:
  capoeira.agroverse.shop video embed fix + Ginga warm-up + move coverage
  
  Diagnosed and fixed the 'Video unavailable' state on library.html, plus
  two practice-experience improvements and the home-page copy polish.
  
  YouTube ops (no PR — admin@truesight.me channel data updates):
  
  1. Root cause of 'Video unavailable' identified: all 39 per-move clips
     were uploaded as privacyStatus=public but with embeddable=False, so
     iframe embeds returned 401 Unauthorized. Wrote a one-off script
     that pulled video IDs from capoeira/data/moves.json, authed via
     the existing agroverse_shop/scripts/youtube_token.json, and patched
     status.embeddable=True on all 39. Library videos now play in the
     modal.
  
  2. Populated descriptions on all 39 videos. Each description carries
     the move's notes + PT/EN transcripts + theme/difficulty/tempo +
     three back-links: capoeira.agroverse.shop/library.html,
     capoeira.agroverse.shop/practice.html, and agroverse.shop. Tags
     added (capoeira, tribo bahia mirim, bico duro, agroverse, plus
     per-move name/theme/difficulty).
  
  Shipped:
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#20 — session-generator + index.html polish:
     - Ginga is now always position 0 of every generated session — it's
       literally the foundational rocking step every other move builds
       on. Excluded from theme candidates so no dupe; prepended after
       pickMoves. Theme move budget reduced by Ginga's duration so total
       stays ~45min.
     - Per-move coverage weighting: never-practiced moves get a 2x boost
       in scoring, practiced-once gets 1.5x, decaying toward 1x as count
       grows. Over many sessions the user cycles through every move in
       the library with no move permanently neglected.
     - 'Alunos e visitantes escaneiam o código…' → English.
     - Bico Duro photo caption → 'Bico Duro, Tribo Bahia Mirim — partners
       with Agroverse'.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
